sentences.text: Thank you for calling the home office for Lutheran senior Services. If you are calling for information on our senior living community or affordable housing locations press one. If you were looking for resources or assistance for older adults also known as our agent answers program press two. If you are calling for Hospice home health or private duty as part of our home and community based Services press three to dial by department press four to hear these options again press Star. For marketing communications and sales press one for affordable housing press two for human resources press three for billing and accounting press four for advancement press five for construction press six for information technology press seven for administration press eight to hear these options again please press Star. Please wait while I transfer your call. Good morning, Lisa SR Services home office. How may I help you?
